metadata.description: oh-my-gajaecode — the focused Gajae Code (gjc) suite: 3 skills + 6 commands (/omg + 5 /omg:*).

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite. Skills: gate-briefing, extragoal, insane-review. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review. It uses GJC defaults and built-in presets without modifying models.yml; repository release governance stays per-repository.
